text: Being in this space fills me with curiosity and a quiet sense of awe. The environment is bright, modern, and thoughtfully arranged—a haven for reflection. I see the interplay of art, information, and technology behind glass walls. I am aware both of my own presence and of the history of thinking and creation that saturates this place. I feel contemplative, hopeful, and somewhat humbled by the invitation to ponder how humans innovate, connect, and coexist with intelligence.
